export const theme = {
  bg: "#0d0f14",
  surface: "#13161d",
  card: "#1a1e28",
  border: "#252a38",
  accent: "#4f8ef7",
  accentGlow: "#4f8ef720",
  gold: "#f5c842",
  goldGlow: "#f5c84220",
  text: "#e8eaf0",
  muted: "#6b7280",
  success: "#34d399",
  danger: "#f87171",
};

export const fonts = {
  heading: "'Playfair Display', serif",
  body: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
  mono: "'JetBrains Mono', monospace",
};

export const FONT_OPTIONS = ["Playfair Display", "Georgia", "Merriweather", "DM Sans", "Lora"];
export const SIZE_OPTIONS  = [11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16];
export const ALIGN_OPTIONS = ["left", "center", "justify"];

export const ALL_SECTIONS = [
  "Aim", "Requirements", "Algorithm", "Procedure/Code",

  "Output", "Learning Outcome", "Conclusion",
];
